functionDeclarations.name: get_skill_markdown
functionDeclarations.description: Fetch the raw markdown instructions for a specific skill from the SkillsGem Edge API.

id.description: The unique slug ID of the skill (e.g., 'frontend-engineer').

functionDeclarations.name: semantic_search_skills
functionDeclarations.description: Discover relevant skills using AI semantic embedding search.

q.description: Search query describing the problem or desired capability (e.g., 'database migration').

functionDeclarations.name: get_technical_memory_matrix
functionDeclarations.description: Retrieves the aggregated session matrix (MEMORY, ROADMAP, CHANGELOG, AGENTS) for absolute state continuity and session handover.

mode.description: Set to 'text' to return raw markdown or 'json' for strict schema representation. Default is 'text'.
